gates.title: Runtime backup pruning cannot remove the snapshot currently being finalized
evidence_required: paths.finalize_backup_snapshot passes the current snapshot as a protected path
prune_runtime_backups.py accepts --protect and excludes protected paths from normal and emergency deletion

gates.title: Validated DB backup survives finalize/prune before update sync
evidence_required: Critical table counts match between source and backup

gates.title: Release closeout reads protocol evidence from the canonical runtime DB
evidence_required: verify_release_readiness.py resolves db_path through the shared paths helper under the target NEXO_HOME
Legacy data/nexo.db closeout compatibility remains covered

gates.title: Public release surfaces and integration artifacts are aligned for v7.30.3
evidence_required: README, llms, homepage, blog index, blog post, changelog page, and sitemap reference v7.30.3
Claude plugin, ClawHub skill, and OpenClaw package metadata reference 7.30.3
Release smoke and readiness checks validate the v7.30.3 contract before tag publish
